name: alsa-ucm-conf
title: alsa-ucm-conf
summary: ALSA Use Case Manager configuration files
description:
ALSA Use Case Manager configuration files
This package contains ALSA Use Case Manager configuration of audio
input/output names and routing for specific audio hardware. They can be
used with the alsaucm tool.
.
Installing these configuration files is absolutely necessary to make some
sound hardware work. Its installation is highly recommended in order to
use ALSA-backed hardware.
.
ALSA is the Advanced Linux Sound Architecture.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use alsa-ucm-conf because ALSA Use Case Manager configuration files.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use alsa-ucm-conf as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair alsa-ucm-conf with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `alsa-ucm-conf --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
